chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 70 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.172/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.173/2026 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 21.01.2026 Petitioner Abdul Hameed Chohan in person >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2,3&4. Petitioner was dismissed from service by NADRA as far as back in 2013. In 2025, he made a Mercy Appeal to Chairman NADRA for reinstatement. Thereafter, he moved C.P No.D-722 of 2025 for directions to Chairman, NADRA to decide his Mercy Appeal, which Petition was disposed of on 25.09.2025 with such order. Now by order dated 12.12.2025, Chairman NADRA has dismissed the Mercy Appeal of the Petitioner, which order is now challenged before this Court. Apparently, the Petitioner has exhausted all departmental remedies without success. The order on the Mercy Appeal is a speaking order passed after considering all relevant facts. Same does not call for any interference by this Court in its writ jurisdiction. Therefore, the Petition is dismissed in limine along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
